title: Dionysius Lardner
body: Dionysius Lardner FRS FRSE (3 April 1793 – 29 April 1859) was an Irish scientific writer and science and technology populariser who edited the 133-volume The Cabinet Cyclopædia.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in British English
